code:
%%{IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> Invited: UserInvitedEvent
    Invited --> PendingActivation: UserRegisteredEvent
    [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> PendingActivation: UserRegisteredEvent
    PendingActivation --> Active: UserActivatedEvent
    Active --> Suspended: UserSuspendedEvent
    Suspended --> Active: UserUnsuspendedEvent
    Active --> Deactivated: UserDeactivatedEvent
    Deactivated --> Active: UserReactivatedEvent
    Active --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent
    Suspended --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent
    Deactivated --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent

    %% State styling with classes
    classDef invitedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:white
    classDef pendingState fill:#F39C12,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:black
    classDef activeState fill:#27AE60,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:black
    classDef suspendedState fill:#D35400,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:black
    classDef deactivatedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:white
    classDef archivedState fill:#34495E,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:white

    class Invited invitedState
    class PendingActivation pendingState
    class Active activeState
    class Suspended suspendedState
    class Deactivated deactivatedState
    class Archived archivedState

    %% Notes
    note right of Invited
        User has been invited but has not registered
    end note

    note right of PendingActivation
        User has registered but not activated their account
    end note

    note right of Active
        User has an active account and can access all features
    end note

    note right of Suspended
        User account has been temporarily suspended
        by an administrator
    end note

    note right of Deactivated
        User has voluntarily deactivated their account
    end note

    note right of Archived
        User account has been archived (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网的EdgeNode和PLC Logic设计一个用户生命周期状态机。核心是从邀请开始，经过PendingActivation，最终到Active，还要有暂停、停用和归档这些终态分支。
明白了，EdgeNode和PLC Logic都是入口触发点对吧？那这两个节点是并行触发Invited和PendingActivation，还是说PLC Logic直接跳到PendingActivation跳过邀请环节？
对，EdgeNode走邀请流程，发UserInvitedEvent到Invited状态；PLC Logic那边是内部系统直接注册，走UserRegisteredEvent到PendingActivation。两条线最终都汇聚到PendingActivation等待激活。
好，我先把主线画出来：Invited通过UserRegisteredEvent转到PendingActivation，PendingActivation再通过UserActivatedEvent到Active。然后Active分出三条支路——Suspended、Deactivated和Archived。
Suspended和Deactivated都需要能回到Active，但Archived是单向的终态。另外Suspended和Deactivated也能直接进Archived，比如长期不处理的账号。
收到，Suspended通过UserUnsuspendedEvent回Active，Deactivated通过UserReactivatedEvent回Active，三个状态都能触发UserArchivedEvent进Archived。状态样式方面需要区分吗？
需要，用颜色区分生命周期阶段：Invited和Deactivated用灰色，PendingActivation用橙色警示，Active绿色，Suspended深橙，Archived深蓝灰。每个状态右侧加注释说明业务含义。
已完成。Invited注释为"用户已被邀请但未注册"，PendingActivation是"已注册但未激活"，Active是"账户活跃可使用全部功能"，Suspended是"管理员临时暂停"，Deactivated是"用户自愿停用"，Archived标注了IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController作为归档标记。
